articles.title: Thunder's unethical stunt a slap in the face to Western Conference foes - Thunderous Intentions
articles.description: The OKC Thunder hold all the cards, and they have shown no restraint in how they intend to use them.
articles.content:
With their win over the Los Angeles Clippers on Wednesday night, the OKC Thunder secured their third straight playoff berth as the first seed in the Western Conference.
